search_azure_rest_api_code.description: Search for code within the GitHub repository: "Azure/azure-rest-api-specs" using the GitHub Search API (exact match). Returns matching files for you to query further if relevant.

query.description: The search query to find relevant code files

page.description: Page number to retrieve (starting from 1). Each page contains 30 results.

text.value:
Here are a couple of key "readme.md" files related to the Azure REST API specifications, which cover different areas. Unfortunately, there isn't a single "Readme" for the entire repository, as it is organized into various modules and tools:

1. **Lint Diff Tool README**:
   - **URL**: [eng/tools/lint-diff/README.md](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/747924efbf3f3053b153ecf60a17e9205805eef3/eng/tools/lint-diff/README.md)
   - **Summary**: Discusses the lint-diff tool used for comparing two API specification files to detect changes and enforce validation rules.

2. **Data Plane Readme for App**:
   - **URL**: [specification/app/data-plane/readme.md](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/747924efbf3f3053b153ecf60a17e9205805eef3/specification/app/data-plane/readme.md)
   - **Summary**: Covers the specifications related to the data plane of Azure App services.

Each directory and service area in the Azure API specifications may have its own Readme to explain its particular context. If you want more detailed information about a specific area, feel free to ask!
Please summarize the Azure REST API specifications Readme
